meta.title: Mizan Consulting & Training
meta.description: A Libyan house of expertise for financial, administrative and digital transformation consulting with Odoo.

footer.credentialSince: A Libyan house of expertise since 2004
footer.address: 23 July Street, Borj Alsalam Building, 5th Floor, Office 4, Benghazi, Libya

hero.eyebrow: A Libyan house of expertise since 2004
hero.headline: Balance, made digital.
hero.sub: Mizan pairs deep financial and administrative expertise with Odoo-led digital transformation — helping Libyan and regional institutions run their operations with clarity and confidence.

thesis.heading: Two pillars, one balance
thesis.body: We don't start with the system — we start with understanding how your business actually runs. We analyze the gaps, redesign the procedures, then design the solution, train your team, and stay after launch — until the system becomes a genuine tool for oversight and decision-making, not just new software.
thesis.label: Philosophy

services.heading: Four services, one balance
services.sub: From gap analysis to post-launch training — every service is built to serve management, not just configuration.

odoo.heading: From understanding to post-launch support
odoo.sub: We cover Odoo projects from version 13 through 19 — with a clear methodology that doesn't stop at technical setup.

steps.trainDesc: Enabling your users on the system

odoo.outcome: The result: Odoo systems configured around how your organization actually works — not the other way around.

sectors.heading: Sectors we understand in detail
sectors.sub: From government institutions to aviation — we've worked with organizations of very different oversight needs and operational complexity.

clients.heading: Trusted by institutions that mean business

cta.heading: Let's talk about your organization
cta.sub: A first consultation, no strings attached — we understand where you stand today and propose the right path forward.

about.heading: A house of expertise, not just a technology vendor
about.intro: Mizan Consulting & Training is a Libyan house of expertise specialized in developing the financial, administrative and operational performance of organizations — through consulting, training, and business transformation using ERP systems, chiefly Odoo.
about.body1: We don't stop at implementing systems. We start by understanding how the business actually works, analyzing gaps, reviewing procedures, and designing solutions — then training users and following through on adoption, until the system becomes a genuine tool for management, oversight and decision-making.
about.body2: We work with our clients as a professional partner helping them move from a workplace built on individuals and scattered files, to one that's organized, documented, and built to scale.
about.differentiator: Combining financial and administrative expertise with a deep technical and operational understanding of the system — so the solutions we deliver genuinely serve management, not just technical configuration.

industriesPage.heading: We speak your sector's language
industriesPage.sub: Every industry has its own oversight requirements and operational complexity — that's what we build into every engagement.

careers.heading: Build your career with us
careers.sub: We're always looking for talent in financial and administrative consulting and Odoo delivery. No open positions are listed right now — send your CV and we'll reach out when a suitable role opens up.
careers.valuesSub: The same principles that govern our work with clients are what we look for in colleagues.

understand.title: Understand before implementing
understand.desc: People who ask "why" before proposing a solution, not just deploying systems without grasping how the organization actually works.

learn.title: Continuous learning
learn.desc: Odoo keeps evolving, and so do our clients' needs — we look for people who keep pace with real curiosity.

measure.title: Measurable results
measure.desc: People who think about the actual impact on a client's business, not just checking a task off on paper.

digital.title: Digital-first mindset
digital.desc: People who see digital systems as a tool for discipline and efficiency, not extra overhead.

contactPage.heading: Let's start the conversation
contactPage.sub: Fill out the form or reach us directly — we'll get back to you within one business day.

form.name: Full name
form.successBody: Thank you for reaching out to Mizan — a member of our team will contact you within one business day.
form.errorBody: Something went wrong sending your request. Please try again, or email us directly at info@mizan.com.ly.
